title: F3+C
description: Make F3 + C keybind copy actual location without command
body:
_Have you ever pressed f3 + c not for crash? You noticed that this keybind copies strange command except your location? **You just want to copy your location?**_

This mod fixes this!

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4DGw5sa9/images/66be9854700e88250c25e55e22df22b233993548.gif)

# Dependencies:
_Nothing_
